nasb.text: Therefore leaving the elementary teaching about the Christ, let us press on to maturity, not laying again a foundation of repentance from dead works and of faith toward God,

esv.text: Therefore let us leave the elementary doctrine of Christ and go on to maturity, not laying again a foundation of repentance from dead works and of faith toward God,

ccb.text: 所以我们要离开有关基督的初级道理，努力迈向成熟，而不是再次打基础：教导为致死的行为悔改、信靠上帝、

csbs.text: 所以，让我们从基督话语的基本原则出发，被神带到那成熟的境界；而不用重新打基础，就如悔改那些致死的行为、对神的信仰、
